name: Summer Reset Bundle
description: The Stay on Track: Vacation Reset Bundle is designed to support energy, recovery, stress resilience, and restorative sleep during periods of increased demands, disrupted routines, travel, and busy schedules. Includes NAD+, Wolverine (BPC-157 + TB-500), L-Theanine, Magnesium Glycinate and DSIP (Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide).
indication: Recommended for individuals experiencing fatigue, poor sleep, increased stress, mental fog, muscle or joint discomfort, reduced recovery, or difficulty maintaining healthy routines due to travel, summer activities, demanding work schedules, family obligations, or other lifestyle stressors. Ideal for those looking to maintain energy, resilience, recovery, and overall wellness during busy seasons of life.
